all_models_wrong.stem_preview: twenty three.The growth of energy consumption in a region is positively correlated with economic growth, and the difference in growth between the two is usually no more than 15%.In 2003, a statistical report from Zhejiang Province showed th

options.C: Due to the sharp increase in energy prices, the economic growth of large state-owned enterprises with high energy consumption generally declined.?

options.D: All gold glitters, so some glitters are gold.

overall.note: Hidden-family and long-tail forensic audit; stronger than aggregate blind replay, still weaker than fully new-source unseen evaluation.
